motivo: código extraído mas apenas 5/6 seções presentes
resposta:
solution:
def getHint(self, secret: str, guess: str) -> str:
    bulls = 0
    cows = 0
    for i in range(len(secret)):
        if secret[i] == guess[i]:
            bulls += 1
        else:
            cows += 1
    hint = f"{bulls}A{cows}"
    return hint

efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(n)
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
